code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 13 or c == 10
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  let n = nums.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match nums.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if x > t
        if first
          out = "#{x}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{x}"
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
